titleZh: 上市公司收购管理办法（2014年修正）
titleEn: Measures for the Administration of the Takeover of Listed Companies (2014 Amendment)
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 2014 年对上市公司收购管理办法的关键修正节点，与并购重组规则同步调整，是 2020 年修正前的中期代表性版本。
summaryEn: The key 2014 amendment node for the takeover measures, revised alongside the M&A reorganization regime and serving as the principal mid-cycle version before 2020.
applicablePeriodZh: 2014年11月23日起适用，后续由 2020 年修正文本继续承接。
applicablePeriodEn: Applied from November 23, 2014, and was later succeeded by the 2020 amended text.

sources.label: Official Chinese
sources.noteZh: 证监会 2014 年修正决定 PDF，用户阅读该版本时应与修正后的办法正文合并理解。
sources.noteEn: Official 2014 amendment decision PDF; users should read it together with the post-amendment text.

sources.label: Official release
sources.noteZh: 证监会关于收购办法体系的正式发布页，可作为官方备链。
sources.noteEn: Formal CSRC release page for the takeover-measures regime, used as a backup official access point.
